allow: Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "ls ~/coco-tools && which lwasm && which xroar && ls ~/coco-tools 2>&1 | head -50")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'which lwasm xroar python3; lwasm --version 2>&1 | head -1')
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'which mame && mame -version 2>&1 | head -3 && echo "---" && mame -listxml ladybug 2>&1 | head -20')
